## Summary of CI Check Results
### 1. Linting (make lint / uv run ruff check) **Exit Code: 1 (FAILED)**
Found 35 linting errors with 8 fixable:
**Import/Sorting Issues:** - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-slots/src/erk_slots/navigation.py:3` - Import block is un-sorted or un-formatted (I001) - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/test_navigation_helpers.py:3` - Import block is un-sorted or un-formatted (I001)
**Unused Imports:** - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-slots/src/erk_slots/navigation.py:16` - `erk.core.worktree_pool.PoolState` imported but unused (F401) - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-slots/src/erk_slots/navigation.py:18` - `erk_shared.debug.debug_log` imported but unused (F401) - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-slots/src/erk_slots/navigation.py:32` - `erk.cli.commands.navigation_helpers.check_clean_working_tree` imported but unused (F401) - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-slots/src/erk_slots/navigation.py:33` - `erk.cli.commands.navigation_helpers.check_pending_learn_marker` imported but unused (F401) - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-slots/src/erk_slots/navigation.py:36` - `erk.cli.commands.navigation_helpers.verify_pr_closed_or_merged` imported but unused (F401) - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/navigation_helpers.py:17` - `erk.core.worktree_pool.load_pool_state` imported but unused (F401)
**Line Length Issues (E501):** Multiple files with lines exceeding 100 characters: - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-slots/tests/unit/test_down_cmd.py:73` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-slots/tests/unit/test_down_cmd.py:117` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-slots/tests/unit/test_up_cmd.py` (multiple lines: 317, 442, 1079, 1121, 1160, 1202, 1422)
### 2. Type Checking (make typecheck) **Exit Code: 2 (NOT AVAILABLE)**
No `typecheck` target in Makefile. The type checking command is `make ty` (runs `uv run ty check`).
### 3. Unit Tests (make unit) **Exit Code: 2 (NOT AVAILABLE)**
No `unit` target in Makefile. The correct target is `make test-unit-erk` or `make test` (runs unit tests).
### Actual Unit Tests (from py-fast-ci): **Exit Code: 1 (FAILED)** - 5 test failures out of 5848 total tests
**Failed Tests:** 1. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/test_graphite_command.py::test_real_up_command_is_graphite_command` - Error: `ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'erk.cli.commands.up'`
